---
title: "About Me"
---

# About Me

Hi, I’m **Kelvin**.

I’m a student interested in **computer science & math** currently studying at **Colgate University**.

## My interests

Right now, some of the areas I’m most interested in are:

- Software engineering
- Machine learning
- Statistics

## My goals

Some of my goals are to:

- become a stronger programmer
- build meaningful projects
- improve my problem-solving skills

## Outside of academics

Outside of class, I like running and playing piano. I want to explore making projects related to these interests in the future.

## Thanks~!
